creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks. I changed something hoever: 

- INSTALLS_SHLIB is not need if you USE_LDCONFIG. And 
INSTALLS_SHLIB is obsolete, to avoid the warning you need to update 
portlint(1) 
- Remove USE_GCC since I've patched it to build on 4.x - Added some 
@dirrmtry's into plist for locale stuff
